arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou set to be without four Tottenham players from Everton defeat vs Hoffenheim
arts.sum: Now set to take on Hoffenheim in the Europa League on Thursday evening, Postecoglou will be without a further four players from the matchday squad that he named for last weekend's game against Everton. At a time when Tottenham desperately require a win, Ange Postecoglou has very little options to choose from when it comes to his team selection.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou and Tottenham already have long-term Son Heung-min solution
arts.sum: Perhaps in need of a breather at a time when injuries have hit Tottenham hard or certainly not helped on some occasions by having to play through the middle, Spurs have to find a way of getting Son back to the peak of his powers. At a time when Spurs are struggling on the pitch and are in desperate need of a win amid the mounting pressure on the head coach's shoulders, Son has been unable to hit top form and unfortunately looks a shadow of his former self right now.

arts.ttl: Tottenham team Postecoglou to pick vs Hoffenheim with no Son as Moore starts
arts.sum: Gold's team: Austin; Porro, Dragusin, Davies, Gray; Kulusevski, Bentancur, Maddison; Moore, Richarlison, Son. Guest's team: Austin; Porro, Dragusin, Davies, Gray; Bergvall, Bentancur, Maddison; Kulusevski, Richarlison, Moore.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: West Ham offer 'magician' a contract after also agreeing £13m Banzuzi deal, but Spurs in talks too
arts.sum: However, Tottenham are in talks too... 👀

arts.ttl: Under-fire Ange Postecoglou handed boost as two Tottenham stars return to training ahead of Europa League tie against Hoffenheim
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has been provided with a timely boost after two star players returned to training this week ahead of Thursday's trip to Hoffenheim in the Europa League.

arts.ttl: How Moyes' Everton frustrated Tottenham - analysis
arts.sum: Match Of The Day 2 pundits Leon Osman and Farah Williams analyse Everton's 3-2 victory over Tottenham - and discuss what manager Ange Postecoglu can do to turn around Spurs' form.

arts.ttl: Agent dangling big signing in front of Tottenham – Would surely be ambitious given league position
arts.sum: Dusan Vlahovic’s agent is dangling the potential signing in front of Tottenham, although it may be ambitious more than anything. La Stampa report that Vlahovic’s agent is dangling him in front of several clubs in Europe, Tottenham among them. arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur’s list of injuries continues to grow with another player suffering an issue in training ahead of the team’s trip to Hoffenheim. Ange Postecoglou’s...
